item.title: Ukraine Hits Russian Refineries, Oil Depots and Port in Massive 208-Drone Overnight...
item.description: Ukraine Hits Russian Refineries, Oil Depots and Port in Massive 208-Drone Overnight Assault  Kyiv PostOne killed, two injured in Ukrainian drone attack on Russia's Volgograd region, governor says  ReutersUkrainian drone attack triggers fire at a Russian oil terminal  AP NewsA new Meduza analysis finds Ukraine’s long-range strikes are reaching twice as deep but not surging in 2026. Russia’s refineries, meanwhile, keep bouncing back.  MeduzaUkraine confirms strike on oil refinery in Russia's Volgograd region  Ukrinform - Ukrainian National News Agency
